name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
description: Direct income support of Rs. 6000 per year to small and marginal farmers.
eligibility: Small and marginal farmers with cultivable land up to 2 hectares. Must be Indian citizen.
benefits: Rs. 6000 per year in 3 equal installments of Rs. 2000 directly to bank account.
application_process: Register on pmkisan.gov.in or visit nearest CSC/Village Level Entrepreneur.

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: Comprehensive crop insurance scheme covering losses from natural calamities, pests and diseases.
eligibility: All farmers (loanee and non-loanee) growing notified crops in notified areas.
benefits: Insurance coverage for crop loss with minimal premium: 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi, 5% for Horticulture.
application_process: Apply through bank, insurance company, or CSC before cutoff date for each season.

name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC)
description: Flexible credit facility for farmers to meet agricultural expenses at low interest rates.
eligibility: Farmers, tenant farmers, oral lessees, share croppers, and SHGs/JLGs of farmers.
benefits: Credit limit up to Rs. 3 lakh at 7% interest (with 3% subvention = effective 4%). Higher limits for larger farms.
application_process: Apply at nearest bank branch or cooperative society with land documents.

name: Soil Health Card Scheme
description: Provides farmers a Soil Health Card with crop-wise recommendations for nutrients and fertilizers.
benefits: Free soil testing, personalized fertilizer recommendations, improved yields, reduced input costs.
application_process: Contact local agriculture department or KVK for soil sample collection.

name: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchai Yojana (PMKSY)
description: Har Khet Ko Pani - Ensures irrigation access to every farm, promotes water-use efficiency.
benefits: Subsidy on micro-irrigation (drip/sprinkler), watershed development, water conservation.
application_process: Apply through district agriculture office or horticulture department.

name: eNAM (National Agriculture Market)
description: Online trading platform connecting farmers directly to buyers across India.
eligibility: All registered farmers in participating states.
benefits: Better price discovery, transparent trading, direct access to multiple buyers, digital payments.
application_process: Register at enam.gov.in or nearest APMC market committee.

name: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
description: Promotes organic farming through cluster-based approach and certification support.
eligibility: Farmers willing to adopt organic farming in clusters of 50 acres minimum.
benefits: Rs. 50,000 per hectare over 3 years for organic inputs, certification, and marketing support.
application_process: Form groups of 50 farmers, apply through district agriculture office.

name: Agriculture Infrastructure Fund (AIF)
description: Financing facility for viable projects for post-harvest management and community farming assets.
eligibility: Farmers, FPOs, SHGs, cooperatives, agri-entrepreneurs, startups.
benefits: Loans up to Rs. 2 crore with 3% interest subvention and credit guarantee coverage.
application_process: Apply through banks or agri-infra.dac.gov.in portal.

name: National Beekeeping & Honey Mission (NBHM)
description: Supports development of scientific beekeeping and honey production for additional farmer income.
eligibility: Farmers, unemployed youth, SHGs, FPOs interested in beekeeping.
benefits: Subsidy on bee boxes, colonies, extraction equipment, training and skill development.
application_process: Apply through district horticulture officer or KVIC/Khadi board.

name: Rashtriya Krishi Vikas Yojana (RKVY)
description: Holistic development of agriculture and allied sectors to ensure farmer income growth.
eligibility: State governments apply on behalf of farmers; individual farmers benefit through state schemes.
benefits: Funding for infrastructure, skill development, value chain projects, agri-tech startups (RAFTAAR).
